Interface RasterGeometryProc

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.DatasourcesRaster
Assembly
ESRI.Server.DatasourcesRaster.dll

A mechanism to perform raster geometric operations, such as flip, rotate, and merge on rasters.

[Guid("2B473C3C-B18E-11D3-A650-0008C7DF88A8")]
public interface RasterGeometryProc : IRasterGeometryProc
